news_items.headline: The last Padre with a 4-K frame before Miller? His manager
Sinkers sink Mariners in 6-1 loss to White Sox
news_items.summary: After a 12-run explosion yesterday, the Mariners couldn’t summon up a ton of offense, and their pitchers gave up three homers in a 6-1 loss against the White Sox. Luis Castillo couldn’t wiggle out of some first-inning trouble after giving up a leadoff single to Sam Antonacci on a fastball that came in at 95 […]

news_items.headline: Dustin May’s Great Start, Bad Ending as Padres Beat Cardinals 4-2
news_items.summary: Dustin May had a great start to the game not allowing a hit to the San Diego Padres until the bottom of the 5th inning, but that’s when the wheels came off the no-hit wagon. The Padres would eventually outslug the Cardinals 4-2 Saturday night. The bats of both the St. Louis Cardinals and San […]
